_meta.principle: GitHub source code, issues, PRs, and project boards are the single source of truth. Every region must map to GitHub state. Internal docs / GTM artifacts / conceptual aggregations are NOT regions.

desc.en: Aggregator: Console + Studio + Workflow stable before Show HN. Tracked on board aevatarAI #23.
desc.zh: 聚合节点: Console + Studio + Workflow 在 Show HN 前稳定可用。看板 aevatarAI #23

label.zh: 多 Channel 适配器 (Lark / Telegram / …)

desc.en: RFC #254 + ADR 0008-0013: channel-agnostic abstraction (IChannelTransport / IChannelOutboundPort / IMessageComposer / ConversationReference) replacing the 53-file ChannelRuntime megamodule. Milestone #6 'Channel Runtime Foundation' tracks rollout.
desc.zh: RFC #254 + ADR 0008-0013: channel 无关抽象 (IChannelTransport / IChannelOutboundPort / IMessageComposer / ConversationReference), 替换 53 个文件的 ChannelRuntime 大模块。里程碑 #6 'Channel Runtime Foundation' 跟踪推进

Aevatar-Channel-Multi-Adapter.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar milestone:"Channel Runtime Foundation"

desc.en: ADR 0017 + 17 design docs: surface Team as first-class backend aggregate under Scope. Member workbench, team directory, workspace wording. Milestones #2 / #3 / #8 / #10 / #11 / #12 actively shipping.
desc.zh: ADR 0017 + 17 篇设计文档: Team 作为 Scope 下一等聚合, Member workbench, Team Directory, Workspace 语义。里程碑 #2 / #3 / #8 / #10 / #11 / #12 持续在发

Aevatar-Studio-Team-First.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar label:"team" OR (Studio in:title OR Team in:title)

label.zh: EventSourcing / CQRS 加固 (稳定性优化项)

desc.en: louis backlog on stability/architecture refinement. Async write + read-model freshness contract: #592 (backend async op contract for CQRS), #593 (frontend async op handling for read-model latency), #594 (unify async write/observation/freshness), #616 (replace ScopeBinding readmodel polling with explicit binding-readiness observation). Projection plumbing: #591 (reduce current-state projection boilerplate), #533 (standardize ES projection index mappings), #543 (activate NyxID OAuth binding projection scope). StreamingProxy refactor: #376 (actorize + remove participant double writes), #377 (clarify projection lease scope). Legacy: #381 (EventSourcing OCC stale _pending).
desc.zh: louis 在稳定性 / 架构精细化的 backlog. 异步写入 + 读模型新鲜度契约: #592 (CQRS 后端异步操作契约), #593 (前端异步操作处理读模型延迟), #594 (统一异步写 / 观察 / 新鲜度), #616 (用绑定就绪观察替换 ScopeBinding readmodel 轮询)。Projection 管线: #591 (削减 current-state projection 模板), #533 (标准化 ES projection 索引映射), #543 (激活 NyxID OAuth 绑定 projection scope)。StreamingProxy 重构: #376 (actor 化 + 去掉参与方双写), #377 (理清 projection lease scope)。历史项: #381 (EventSourcing OCC 残留 _pending)。

label.en: Aevatar M14 — Responses API v1 Prototype
label.zh: Aevatar M14 — Responses API v1 原型

desc.en: Aggregator: GitHub milestone #14 'Responses API v1 Minimal Prototype' — current focus. End state: user configures NyxID base URL + API key in Codex/Cursor/Opencode; request flows client -> NyxID -> Aevatar /v1/responses -> NyxID LLM -> client. Product RFC discussion #609.
desc.zh: 聚合节点: GitHub milestone #14 'Responses API v1 Minimal Prototype' — 当前焦点。终态: 用户在 Codex/Cursor/Opencode 里配置 NyxID base URL + API key, 请求链路 client → NyxID → Aevatar /v1/responses → NyxID LLM → client。产品 RFC 讨论 #609

Aevatar-M14-Milestone.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar milestone:"Responses API v1 Minimal Prototype"

desc.en: M14 blocker: refactor ChatRuntime / ChannelLlmReplyInboxRuntime to match Harness boundary (#568). #608 is the umbrella refactor; #596 collapses ChatRuntime into actor-owned Agent Continuation (assigned eanzhao).
desc.zh: M14 blocker: 把 ChatRuntime / ChannelLlmReplyInboxRuntime 重构到 Harness boundary (#568)。#608 主重构 issue, #596 (eanzhao 已 assigned) 把 ChatRuntime 收敛为 actor-owned Agent Continuation

Aevatar-ChatRuntime-Harness.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar ChatRuntime in:title OR Harness in:title

desc.en: M14 pillar — HTTP layer: minimal /v1/responses endpoint on Aevatar Mainnet Host (#611), normalize Responses payloads into internal chat requests (#612), serialize Responses-compatible SSE output (#614), host-level tests + docs (#615).
desc.zh: M14 支柱 — HTTP 层: Aevatar Mainnet Host 上最小 /v1/responses 端点 (#611), Responses 载荷归一化到内部 chat request (#612), 兼容 Responses 协议的 SSE 输出序列化 (#614), host 级测试 + 文档 (#615)

label.zh: NyxID 鉴权桥 + Scope 端口

desc.en: M14 pillar — security: bridge NyxID request auth into the existing NyxIdLLMProvider (#613), add scope resolution port translating NyxID identity to aevatar scope (#621). §8 of RFC #609.
desc.zh: M14 支柱 — 安全层: 把 NyxID 请求鉴权接入现有 NyxIdLLMProvider (#613), 新增 scope 解析端口把 NyxID 身份翻译为 aevatar scope (#621)。对应 RFC #609 §8

Aevatar-Responses-Auth-Scope.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar scope in:title OR auth in:title

desc.en: M14 pillar — long-running state: run/session ownership actor for opaque response.id (#617), persist forwarded tool calls (#618), POST /v1/responses/{id}/cancel + TTL expiry (#619), resume re-auth + cross-origin resume guard (#620). §13 of RFC #609.
desc.zh: M14 支柱 — 长连接状态: opaque response.id 的 run/session ownership actor (#617), 持久化 forwarded tool call (#618), POST /v1/responses/{id}/cancel + TTL 过期 (#619), resume 重新鉴权 + 跨域 resume guard (#620)。对应 RFC #609 §13

Aevatar-Session-Continuation.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar session in:title OR response.id in:title

desc.en: M14 pillar — agent capability: tool classification layer at /v1/responses boundary (#622), substitute TodoWrite + Task with agent-scoped / topology-aware versions (#623), substitute WebFetch + WebSearch with traced versions (#624). §5 of RFC #609.
desc.zh: M14 支柱 — agent 能力层: /v1/responses 边界的工具分类 (#622), 把 TodoWrite + Task 替换为 agent 范围 / 拓扑感知版本 (#623), 把 WebFetch + WebSearch 替换为带 trace 版本 (#624)。对应 RFC #609 §5

Aevatar-Tool-Classification.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar Substitute in:title OR classification in:title

label.zh: Day One → Ornn skill 迁移

desc.en: Migrate hardcoded AgentBuilder templates (/daily, /social-media) from C# to Ornn skill YAML runtime (#367, #598). SkillRunner hardening (#439, #444-#450). PR #576 (Lark Ornn autoload) shipped 2026-05-07.
desc.zh: AgentBuilder 模板 (/daily, /social-media) 从硬编码 C# 迁移到 Ornn skill YAML 运行时 (#367, #598)。SkillRunner 加固 (#439, #444-#450)。PR #576 (Lark Ornn autoload) 2026-05-07 已合并

Aevatar-Ornn-Skill-Platform.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar Ornn in:title OR daily in:title OR SkillRunner in:title

desc.en: RFC #560: unify external long-lived streams (WebSocket / WebRTC / SSE / polling) as actor-first SessionStreamGAgent. Co-assigned jason-aelf / louis4li / eanzhao; team-discussion phase, ADR not yet written.
desc.zh: RFC #560: 把外部长连接流 (WebSocket / WebRTC / SSE / polling) 统一为 actor 一等 SessionStreamGAgent。jason-aelf / louis4li / eanzhao 三人共同 assignee, 团队讨论阶段, ADR 尚未撰写

Aevatar-SessionStream-Abstraction.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:aevatarAI/aevatar SessionStream in:title OR "long connection" in:title

desc.en: GAgentBase / AIGAgentBase / RoleGAgent / ToolManager runtime. Lives in aevatarAI/aevatar-framework, frozen but stable.
desc.zh: GAgentBase / AIGAgentBase / RoleGAgent / ToolManager 核心运行时, 在 aevatarAI/aevatar-framework, 冻结但稳定

desc.en: Dynamic C# script execution inside Virtual Actors. Powering /daily + /social-media AgentBuilder templates in production. PR #515 (script lifecycle build surface) shipped 2026-04-29.
desc.zh: Virtual Actor 内动态执行 C# 脚本, 生产环境驱动 /daily + /social-media AgentBuilder 模板。PR #515 (script lifecycle build surface) 2026-04-29 已合并

desc.en: LLM / Tool / Auth Provider via NyxID, agent tool calls routed through NyxID proxy. PRs #561 / #570 / #571 (OAuth binding rebuild + self-heal) shipped early May. Recent bugs #538 / #543 / #549 (NyxIdSpecCatalog / OAuth rolling-deploy race) prevent mature.
desc.zh: 通过 NyxID 提供 LLM / Tool / Auth Provider, agent 工具调用经 NyxID proxy 路由。PR #561 / #570 / #571 (OAuth binding rebuild + 自愈) 5 月初已合。近期 bug #538 / #543 / #549 (NyxIdSpecCatalog / OAuth 滚动部署竞争) 不满足 mature

desc.zh: Sisyphus 自动推理平台基于 Aevatar Workflow YAML 引擎构建, 当前 PARKED

desc.zh: aevatar-console.aevatar.ai 上 Console / Studio / 核心运行时 Show HN 前稳定运行

desc.en: Microsoft Orleans grain model for persistent, always-on AI agents
desc.zh: 基于 Microsoft Orleans grain 模型的持久化永在线 AI agent 运行时

desc.zh: 面向 Aevatar agent 的声明式 YAML 工作流定义与动态执行引擎

desc.zh: 鉴权反向代理, 将 agent 请求转发到外部 API

desc.zh: 向代理请求自动注入凭证, 支持 header / bearer / query / basic 四种模式

desc.zh: nyxid node start — WebSocket 反连轻量 node, 让本地服务变成 MCP Server

desc.zh: nyxid ssh proxy — SSH-over-WebSocket 穿透。近期高频迭代 (3 天 8 个 PR), 不满足 30 天稳定

desc.zh: 交互式 skill 测试沙盒, Node.js + Python 运行环境 (chrono-sandbox)

desc.zh: ornn-search-and-run / ornn-upload / ornn-build 作为 MCP 工具

desc.zh: 供 Aevatar agent 拉取 skill 列表 + 元数据的 API

desc.zh: 接收 Automath 发现报告, 分类, 存图, 反馈建议 (ADR-008)。Issue #106 / #107

desc.zh: ~25K 行无 mathlib 的 Lean 4 基础库, 11 个模块覆盖从 x²=x+1 推导的 9 个数学分支。formal verified = mature

desc.zh: 2,350+ 机器验证定理 + 27 篇论文 (9 篇已投稿 JNT/ETDS/SIADS/APAL)

desc.zh: 端到端论文生成 → AI 审查 → 投稿, ChatGPT Oracle + Tampermonkey 驱动

desc.en: AI-driven Derive → Discover → Name methodology
desc.zh: AI 驱动的 Derive → Discover → Name 方法论

desc.en: 1-person EXPLORING repo, 0 open issues, 0 releases. README + WORKFLOW.md spec exists. Agent-as-person model + GitHub Issues integration + CLI in one Rust codebase.
desc.zh: 1 人 EXPLORING 仓库, 0 issue 0 release。README + WORKFLOW.md spec 已写。agent-as-person + GitHub Issues 集成 + CLI 在同一 Rust 代码库

desc.en: 5 prototype repos (vibe-soulgarden-expo, vibe-riteset-expo, vibe-soul-garden-mongo-be, vibe-soul-garden-web, vibes-aura-polaroid). All 0 issues, 0 releases, 7-10 weeks stale. Meta-region for Aevatar DX feedback.
desc.zh: 5 个原型仓库, 全 0 issue 0 release, 7-10 周无 commit。Aevatar DX 反馈的 meta 节点

desc.en: GodGPT AI companion persona. Shipped v1.32.4-1.32.7 Dec 2025 - Jan 2026. PARKED.
desc.zh: GodGPT AI 伴侣人格。v1.32.4-1.32.7 (2025-12 ~ 2026-01) 已发布。PARKED

desc.en: Shipped v1.32.0 Oct 2025. PARKED.
Shipped pre-2025-08 (v1.23.0 with payments). Open Apple subscription bugs (#244, #284). PARKED.
desc.zh: 2025-08 前已发布 (v1.23.0)。仍有 Apple 订阅 bug (#244 / #284)。PARKED

desc.en: Tolt referral integration on landing page. Shipped v1.32.9 Jan 2026. PARKED.
desc.zh: 落地页 Tolt 联盟集成。v1.32.9 (2026-01) 已发布。PARKED

desc.en: Unify Lark conversation + NyxID Responses ingress under a single router that forwards events to downstream agents. Collapses the two parallel ingress GAgents (ConversationGAgent + LlmSessionGAgent) into thin shells. Paired with GAgent inventory cleanup.
desc.zh: 把 Lark conversation 与 NyxID Responses 两条入站路径收口到统一 router, 事件转发给下游 agent。让两个并行接入 GAgent (ConversationGAgent + LlmSessionGAgent) 退化为薄壳。与 GAgent 清单瘦身配套。

desc.en: Deprecate Telegram bridge GAgents (#644, route via NyxID relay instead) and audit/remove StreamingProxy if obsolete (#645). Pairs with Router Agent — keep only the in-use ingress/runtime set. (#643 dead Multi-Agent removal is tracked under Aevatar-Ornn-Skill-Platform.)
desc.zh: 废弃 Telegram bridge GAgents (#644, 改走 NyxID relay), 审计 StreamingProxy 是否已废弃 (#645)。与 Router Agent 配套, 只留可用的 ingress/runtime 集合。(#643 死代码 Multi-Agent 清理跟在 Aevatar-Ornn-Skill-Platform 下)

Aevatar-GAgent-Inventory-Cleanup.gh_query: is:issue repo:aevatarAI/aevatar (deprecate OR StreamingProxy OR Telegram) in:title

label.zh: 外部入站 → Router → Team 端到端

desc.en: End-to-end demo convergence: NyxID Direct (/v1/responses) and Lark bot inbound channel both forward through the Router agent to a Studio/Team member, which handles the event via RoleGAgent + NyxID + Ornn. This is the visible 2026 Q2 deliverable that proves the chain works.
desc.zh: 三条线收口的端到端演示: NyxID 直连 (/v1/responses) 与 Lark bot 入站, 都通过 Router agent 转给 Studio/Team 的 member, member 用 RoleGAgent + NyxID + Ornn 处理。2026 Q2 老板要看到的可演示成果, 证明整条链路通了。
